claim: LMFDB editorial board comprises 4 Managing Editors (John Jones / Jennifer Paulhus / David Roe / Andrew Sutherland) and 17 named Associate Editors
LMFDB Development.md explicitly directs prospective contributors to introduce themselves to current developers and maintain frequent developer-feedback loops before contributing material
LMFDB website has no public /contribute /policy or /source page (3x 404 confirmed)

D-1d (LMFDB triangulation of Q(j(tau)) class data) is classified DISTRIBUTION/BLOCKED per the introduce-yourself-then-contribute pattern qualifying as co-authorship-gateway-class outreach (parallel to verdict-209 Aux row binding RamanujanMachine/LMFDB-team direct outreach BLOCKED)
